message:
Implement P4.1b: Bundle Size Estimation & Limits Enforcement

Added comprehensive size estimation module for pre-export validation:
- SizeEstimate struct with plaintext/compressed/encrypted/total tracking
- Database query with filter support (agents, time range)
- Compression ratio estimation (45% for text content)
- Chunk count calculation with AEAD overhead
- Limit checking: 1GB hard limit, 900MB warning threshold
- BundleVerifier for post-export directory validation
- Human-readable format_bytes utility
- User-friendly error messages with suggestions

All 9 unit tests pass covering:
- Size estimation from plaintext
- Empty database handling
- Limit checking (ok/warning/exceeded)
- Bytes formatting
- Display formatting
- Bundle verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
